introSection: Tiger Leaping Gorge is a steel water roller coaster located at Colourful Yunnan Paradise in Jinning, Kunming, Yunnan, China.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in 4 rows for a total of 16 riders per car.

fullText:
Tiger Leaping Gorge is a steel water roller coaster located at Colourful Yunnan Paradise in Jinning, Kunming, Yunnan, China.



Single car trains. Riders are arranged 4 across in 4 rows for a total of 16 riders per car.
